fetch_note: GitHub Discussions GraphQL API not accessible via current MCP toolset. Data below inferred from issue tracker (discussion-labeled issues). For full discussion data run: gh api graphql -f query='{ repository(owner: "CherryHQ", name: "cherry-studio") { discussions(first: 100, orderBy: {field: UPDATED_AT, direction: DESC}) { nodes { number title category { name } author { login } createdAt updatedAt upvoteCount comments { totalCount } answer { author { login } createdAt } } } } }'
